petrol.name: Premium Petrol 91
petrol.description: Reliance Oil Premium Petrol 91 is a standard-grade unleaded fuel suitable for everyday passenger vehicles and motorcycles. It delivers reliable engine performance and meets Ghana NPA quality standards.

petrol.name: Premium Petrol 95
petrol.description: Our 95 RON petrol is formulated for modern, high-compression engines requiring superior combustion efficiency and knock resistance. It helps maintain engine cleanliness and prolongs engine life.

petrol.name: Premium Petrol 98
petrol.description: Reliance Oil Premium Petrol 98 is our highest-grade unleaded fuel, engineered for performance vehicles and engines with advanced ignition systems. It maximises power output and reduces carbon deposits for a cleaner, smoother ride.

diesel.name: Standard Diesel
diesel.description: Reliance Oil Standard Diesel is a dependable automotive gas oil suitable for trucks, buses, generators, and construction equipment. It provides consistent energy output and reliable cold-start performance across Ghana's climate conditions.

diesel.name: Low Sulfur Diesel
diesel.description: Our Low Sulfur Diesel significantly reduces exhaust emissions and is compatible with modern diesel particulate filter systems. It is the preferred choice for environmentally conscious fleet operators and complies with Euro IV emission standards.

diesel.name: Bio Diesel
diesel.description: Reliance Oil Bio Diesel is a renewable, biodegradable fuel blended from plant-based fatty acid methyl esters and conventional diesel. It reduces net CO₂ emissions and supports Ghana's transition toward sustainable energy.
